svg.aria-label: Recursive Harness — a seven-band stratigraphic core sample
svg.title: Recursive Harness
svg.desc: The mark is the primitive itself: a seven-band stratigraphic core sample (LANGUAGE.md S2). Native 30x34 construction centred on a 64x64 artboard (translate 17,15 = clear space). Bars 4 tall on a 5 pitch (1px gaps); ragged widths 18/27/14/30/22/26/30 are the torn-ledger right edge. The top bar is the live oxide seam; bands descend the dug-earth ramp to near-black bedrock. Hard rectangles only — radius 0. The right edge must never be normalised.
